    mtree: Add missing directories generated by certctl

    This is a direct commit to the stable/13 branch, cherry-picking commit
    5b7f73ce16cb ("mtree: Add missing directories generated by certctl"),
    because the "untrusted" directory is called "blacklisted" on stable/13.

    PR: 255639
    Reviewed by:    imp
    Approved by:    emaste (mentor)
    Differential Revision:  https://reviews.freebsd.org/D49037
